div.div:
llama.cpp-omni is OmniInfer's self-developed framework built on llama.cpp.
Optimized for lower latency, higher throughput, and stable long-running local service workloads.
Includes TurboQuant-style optimization work alongside CPU, CUDA, Vulkan, ROCm, Metal, SYCL, and multimodal GGUF support.
